basicInfo.title: Basic information
basicInfo.description: Soon you'll be able to edit each field and sync your information with your official documents.
basicInfo.residenceDescription: You'll be able to set the location shown on your profile.
basicInfo.bioPlaceholder: Briefly describe your career and professional goals.
basicInfo.educationPlaceholder: e.g. High school diploma, BSc in Physical Education, etc.
basicInfo.educationDescription: Education level or qualification reached. Max. {max} characters.
basicInfo.genderImmutableNote: Set during sign-up and can't be edited.

contactInfo.title: Contact details
contactInfo.description: This information is used for private communications. You can allow your email and WhatsApp to be shown on your public portfolio.
contactInfo.emailDescription: This is the email linked to your account. It's also used as your public contact if you enable visibility.
contactInfo.phoneDescription: Internal use only (not shown on your portfolio).
contactInfo.whatsappDescription: Number in international format. If you enable public visibility, it appears as a contact channel on your portfolio.
contactInfo.languagesDescription: Set the languages people can contact you in.
contactInfo.documentsDescription: Will integrate with document verification later on.
contactInfo.showContactToggle: Allow my contact details to be shown on my portfolio
contactInfo.showContactHelp: When enabled, your primary email and WhatsApp appear as contact channels on your public portfolio. This visibility will soon require a Pro plan.

agency.title: Representing agency
agency.emptyDescription: You don't have a representing agency linked to your profile yet.
agency.emptyHelp: If you have an agent, you can ask them to send you a formal invitation from their dashboard to link your profile.
agency.linkedDescription: This is the agency that officially represents your football profile.
agency.modalBodyLead: You're about to unilaterally disconnect your profile from {agency}.
agency.modalBodyDetail: This will remove their name from your public profile and notify the manager of this change. Only do this if your representation has ended or you have justified reasons.

sportProfile.title: Football profile
sportProfile.description: Set your natural positions, preferred foot and current club to guide scouts and clubs.
sportProfile.contractStatusPlaceholder: Free agent, under contract until 2026, etc.

career.heading: Career history
career.subtitle: Edit your stages, propose new teams and submit your request for our team to validate.
career.pendingRequestHelp: Your changes will become visible once the Ballers team approves them.
career.guardCloseCurrent: To mark a new team as current, close the active stage by entering its end year.
career.lockedNotice: You have a pending review request. Wait for the team's response before editing your career history again.
career.notePlaceholder: Tell us the context of the changes or the season to highlight.
career.errorInReview: You already have a request under review. Wait for the team's response.
career.errorConfirmFirst: Confirm and save the changes you want to send before requesting the review.
career.errorPendingDrafts: Confirm or delete the stages being edited before submitting.
career.errorAtLeastOne: Add at least one confirmed stage to your career history.
career.successSubmitted: Request submitted for the team's review.

seasonStats.pendingReviewNotice: You have a pending profile review. The Quality Control team must process it before you can submit more changes.
seasonStats.emptyState: Add your official stats to strengthen your football analysis. You'll be able to sync them with external integrations and reports.
seasonStats.submitPanelLeadOne: You have {count} stat ready to submit. The Quality Control team will confirm this data by verifying official sources.
seasonStats.submitPanelLeadOther: You have {count} stats ready to submit. The Quality Control team will confirm this data by verifying official sources.
seasonStats.submitNotePlaceholder: Add optional info about the source of the stats (e.g. Transfermarkt, BeSoccer)...
seasonStats.duplicateSeasonField: You already added stats for this competition in this season.
seasonStats.duplicateSeasonRegisteredField: You already recorded stats for this competition and season.
seasonStats.duplicateSeasonStatus: A stat already exists for that season and competition.
seasonStats.confirmDeleteSeason: Delete the {season} season? This action cannot be undone.

honours.emptyState: Here you can add achievements, awards and key milestones to strengthen your football CV.
honours.confirmDelete: Delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

externalLinks.emptyState: You haven't added any external links yet. You can add your main platforms using the form below.
externalLinks.labelHelp: Optional. Used as the link's visible title.
externalLinks.primaryCheckbox: Show as the primary link on your public profile.
externalLinks.confirmDelete: Delete the link "{label}"? This action cannot be undone.
externalLinks.suggestionApplied: Suggestion applied. Review and save your changes.

kindDescriptions.highlight: Link used as your main showcase.
kindDescriptions.transfermarkt: Official reference for market value and career history.
kindDescriptions.flashscore: Profile and real-time results from Flashscore.
kindDescriptions.youtube: Channel or playlist with your best plays.
kindDescriptions.instagram: Social profile to show day-to-day and behind the scenes.
kindDescriptions.linkedin: Professional profile aimed at clubs and agents.
kindDescriptions.custom: Additional links you want to highlight.

scouting.descriptionPro: Add detailed information from external scouts about your playing style.
scouting.descriptionFree: Add tactical, physical, mental and technical analysis. You need Pro to save the report.
scouting.topCharacteristicsPlaceholder: e.g. Clinical finishing, Top speed, Aerial play
scouting.tacticsPlaceholder: e.g. Versatile player who reads open spaces well...
scouting.physicalPlaceholder: e.g. Ideal build for high performance, low center of gravity...
scouting.mentalPlaceholder: e.g. Highly competitive, resilient under frustration...
scouting.techniquePlaceholder: e.g. Precise tactical dribbling and excellent oriented control...
scouting.authorPlaceholder: e.g. CCG Scouting, Analyst Pablo Gómez...

market.descriptionPro: Consolidate financial metrics to strengthen negotiations with clubs and agents.
market.descriptionFree: Add your market value and career goals. You need Pro to save them.
market.marketValueDescription: This data can integrate with external platforms to keep it up to date.
market.careerObjectivesPlaceholder: e.g. Sign in the First Division, play in international competitions
market.careerObjectivesDescription: Used to personalize communication with agents and recruiters.

manager.catalogDescriptionPro: Add photos and videos to improve your chances of being contacted.
manager.catalogDescriptionFree: Upload up to {cap} videos. Catalog photos and extra videos are Pro.
manager.photoCapNotice: You've reached the limit of {cap} catalog photos. Delete an existing one from the gallery to free up a slot.
manager.lockedGalleryDescription: Upload up to 5 curated catalog photos for your public profile. Pro plan only.
manager.reorderHint: Use the arrows to order your videos. The first one is featured on your public profile.
manager.videoCapNotice: You've reached the limit of {cap} videos on the Free plan. Activate Pro to add as many as you want.

articles.descriptionPro: Keep your repository of news, interviews and media appearances up to date.
articles.descriptionFree: The Free plan allows up to {cap} press notes. Activate Pro to add more.
articles.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this article?
articles.emptyDescription: You haven't added any press notes yet.
articles.capNotice: You've reached the Free plan limit. Activate Pro to upload all the notes you want.
articles.footerNote: In this section you can add notes linked to your presence in sports media.

proAssets.invalidFormatAlert: You must upload a file in PNG format (ideally with no background).
proAssets.errorBody: There was a problem processing your image. Please try again.
proAssets.title: Pro assets
proAssets.description: Upload your images in PNG format (with a transparent background) to enable the 3D model and the dynamic elements of your Pro portfolio.
proAssets.speedBody: We recommend compressing your PNG images before uploading them. This will ensure fast, smooth loading for visitors to your profile. You can use free tools like Squoosh.
proAssets.tipFormat: .png format to ensure a transparent background.
proAssets.tipNoSquare: Don't upload square photos with stadiums in the background, they break the 3D effect.
proAssets.heroDesc: Giant main image for the cover.

uploadModal.subtitleVideoOnly: Upload videos and highlights. Catalog photos are a Pro feature.
uploadModal.subtitleDefault: Upload photos or videos to enrich your public profile.

seo.photoAlt2: Sports portrait of {name} wearing the {club} shirt
seo.videoAlt1: Video of the best plays and skills by {name}
seo.videoAlt2: Competition and highlights of {name} during the season

notesLayout.newspaperDescription: Daily Press-style editorial layout. Up to 7 notes per edition with typographic hierarchy.
notesLayout.cardsDescription: Simple, clean grid. 3 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet/mobile. Ideal for volume.
notesLayout.updateError: We couldn't update the layout. Please try again.
notesLayout.heading: How your notes are shown on your public profile
notesLayout.help: Choose the format for the Press & Notes section on your /{slug}. The change applies instantly.

articleModal.intro: Paste the article link and we'll auto-fill the title, publisher, date and image. Everything stays editable.
articleModal.scrapeSuccess: Data fetched automatically. Review and edit anything you need before saving.
articleModal.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Breakthrough player of the tournament...
articleModal.imageDescription: Add the direct link to the publisher's photo or thumbnail.
articleModal.errorUpdate: There was an error updating the article.
articleModal.errorCreate: There was an error saving the article.

catalogModal.errorAcceptPolicy: You must accept the usage policies to continue.
catalogModal.errorVideoRequired: Select a clip or paste a YouTube/Vimeo URL.
catalogModal.errorSeasonYearRange: The season year must be between 1900 and 2100.
catalogModal.videoUrlHelp: * Direct video uploads are exclusive to Pro plans.
catalogModal.seasonYearDescription: Use the year the season started (e.g. 2024 for 2024-25). We sort highlights from newest to oldest.
catalogModal.dropzoneTitle: Click to browse or drag a file here
catalogModal.dropzoneConvert: We convert to AVIF automatically to optimize the gallery.
catalogModal.titlePlaceholderPhoto: e.g. Photo at the institutional event
catalogModal.altPlaceholder: Describe the image so Google can find it...
catalogModal.tagsDescription: Include teams, positions and keywords to improve visibility.
catalogModal.policyBody: Content will be publicly visible instantly and audited by the security team.
catalogModal.policyEmphasis: Any inappropriate or offensive content will result in permanent removal.

galleryGrid.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
galleryGrid.deleteFetchError: We couldn't delete the file. Please try again.
galleryGrid.deleteFallbackError: There was an error deleting the file.
galleryGrid.emptyDescription: You don't have any media files uploaded yet.
galleryGrid.flaggedNotice: This file breaches community rules and is not visible on the public profile. Please delete it.

avatar.tooLarge: The image is {size}. Reduce it to {max} or less. Try compressing it at squoosh.app.
avatar.publicUrlError: Couldn't get the public URL of the uploaded image.
avatar.uploadError: An error occurred while uploading the avatar.

careerEditor.skippedNotice: You left your career history for later.
careerEditor.heading: Career history
careerEditor.description: Add your stages by club, division and years.
careerEditor.modalBody: This stage is linked to your Current club. If you delete it, the current club selection will also be cleared.

rowEditor.toggleSecondary: I also played in another category/league
rowEditor.unlinkedLeagueWarning: League not linked to catalog — use the dropdown or it will be stored as plain text.

utils.atLeastOneYear: Enter at least one year (from or to).

translationsEditor.overviewDescription: Spanish is your base and is edited in Football data. Here you translate your profile into English, Italian and Portuguese — each language becomes its own indexable URL. The % is relative to your Spanish content.
translationsEditor.esEditedInFootballData: Spanish is edited in Football data
translationsEditor.bioBlockDescription: Translate each field or auto-complete from Spanish; you can always edit before saving.
translationsEditor.scoutingBlockDescription: The four analysis dimensions + the author.
translationsEditor.draftDisclaimer: Auto-completed versions are drafts: nothing is published until you tap «Save». You get up to 40 regenerations per month; the first translation of each block doesn't count.
translationsEditor.honoursDescriptionEs: Honours are loaded in Spanish from Football data. Pick another language above to translate each honour.
translationsEditor.honoursDescriptionLocale: Translate each honour or auto-complete from Spanish; you can edit before saving. Saved honour by honour.
translationsEditor.limitBannerHint: To activate another language, remove one of the current ones from its tab with “Remove language”.
translationsEditor.lockedHint: Remove an active language to translate into this one.

templateStyles.pageDescription: Pick a base design, set your current club's palette and define the vibe of your personal profile.
templateStyles.lockedPageDescription: Configure the visual appearance of your public page and keep it consistent with your personal brand.
templateStyles.heroAssetMissingBody: To use the Pro Athlete template you need to upload your cutout in the multimedia section.
templateStyles.baseDesignDescription: One template per plan: Free editorial or Pro Athlete.
templateStyles.templateFreeDescription: Minimalist dossier ready to publish your profile instantly.
templateStyles.templateProDescription: Premium experience with motion, parallax and pro assets.
templateStyles.upgradeProLayoutNotice: Upgrade to Pro to use Pro Athlete with motion, parallax and premium assets.
templateStyles.brandColorsDescription: Pick a preset palette or define the colors manually.
templateStyles.livePreviewDescription: A quick view adapted to the device.
